encounter.reason: Donepezil titration follow-up — assess tolerance of donepezil 5 mg daily initiated four weeks prior
encounter.location: First Coast Neurology Associates, 836 Prudential Drive, Suite 1400, Jacksonville, FL 32207

conditions.name: Alzheimer's disease, early onset, mild stage

medications.name: donepezil 5 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 1 tablet by mouth once daily at bedtime

medications.name: donepezil 10 mg oral tablet
medications.sig: Take 1 tablet by mouth once daily at bedtime, starting tonight (2022-05-17)

document_references.description: Telephone follow-up documenting assessment of donepezil 5 mg tolerance four weeks after initiation for Alzheimer's disease. Caregiver reports good tolerance with only mild transient nausea. Plan to titrate donepezil to 10 mg daily at bedtime effective tonight, with continued monitoring and office follow-up scheduled for October 2022.
